description_short: Mobile is Alabama's only saltwater port and sits at the head of Mobile Bay, exposed to Gulf hurricanes and one of the highest tornado-frequency areas in the country.
description_long: Located on the Gulf Coast at the mouth of Mobile Bay, Mobile faces severe hurricane and storm-surge risk from June through November. The region also lies in a secondary peak of tornado activity — locally called "Dixie Alley" — with tornadoes possible year-round, including in winter. Mobile County is served by NWS Mobile (office code MOB) within forecast zone ALZ263 (Mobile Central).
